forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 12 and 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to southwesterly early in the morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of morning fog in the north. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of morning frost near the Barossa Valley. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h tending west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h early in the morning then becoming south to southwesterly and light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Mostly sunny. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers in the southwest, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the southwest, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Becoming cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 12 and 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Partly cloudy. Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Becoming cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Patches of morning frost south of Hawker. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwest to southwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Becoming cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of rain near the eastern border, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Yunta, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming south to southwesterly and light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost south of Leigh Creek. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
